channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democratic Socialists gain ground as voters seek competent government
item.description: DSA-aligned candidates are rebranding the left as the party of childcare and effective governance.

item.title: Record 51% of Americans lack confidence in affording healthcare
item.description: Half of Americans could not reliably afford healthcare even before Medicaid cuts began.

item.title: Obama surprises first 100 visitors at presidential center opening
item.description: Eighteen-year-old Houefa Agassounon from Chicago said she was crying and asked for a hug.

item.title: 65% of Americans disapprove of Trump's handling of Iran, matching his overall job disapproval
item.description: An AP-NORC poll shows a nine-point gap between Republicans who support his presidency and those who back his economic management.
